name: Sweet Potato Pie I
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together yams and butter in a bowl until well blended.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (except the pie shell) to the mixture, stirring with an electric mixer until smooth. Be sure to remove any yam fibers from the batter if they get on the beaters; simply wash them off and continue mixing.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
5. Bake for about 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center of the pie comes out clean.
Makes 8 to 10 servings. Per serving: 340 calories, 5 g protein, 45 g carbohydrate, 14 g fat (6 g saturated), 81 mg cholesterol, 228 mg sodium, 1 g fiber.
